name: pricing models
description: An adaptive post-auction local electricity market framework. It dynamically selects the most appropriate pricing mechanism from 11 options (including Average Price, Marginal Price Adjusted by Spread, Cap and Floor Range Midpoint, Weighted Average, Modified Marginal Price, VCG, Nash Bargaining, Shapley Value, Constrained Optimization, Reinforcement Learning, and the proposed Iterative Proportional Adjusting) based on a composite Market Condition Indicator (MCI) composed of market liquidity, price volatility, unmatched demand, surplus, bidding strategies, and historical transaction patterns.
objective: Maximize the post-auction traded volume of electricity within a local community to integrate more renewable energy and reduce consumer costs while increasing prosumer revenues.

symbols.name: Timestamp
symbols.definition: Date and time of the trading interval

symbols.name: member_id
symbols.definition: Unique identifier of the community member

symbols.name: member_type
symbols.definition: Categorical type of the member (e.g., residential, commercial, prosumer)

symbols.name: load
symbols.definition: Individual electricity consumption of a member at a given timestamp

symbols.name: generation
symbols.definition: Individual electricity generation of a member at a given timestamp

symbols.name: ToU
symbols.definition: Time-of-Use tariff representing the maximum retail purchasing price cap from the main grid

symbols.name: FiT
symbols.definition: Feed-in-Tariff representing the minimum export selling price floor to the main grid

symbols.name: alpha_mpas
symbols.definition: Weight parameter reflecting importance of the spread in Marginal Price Adjusted by Spread pricing model

symbols.name: w_wam
symbols.definition: Weight parameter in Weighted Average Method pricing model; higher values favor buyers

symbols.name: theta_ipa
symbols.definition: Step size parameter controlling price adjustment speed in Iterative Proportional Adjusting mechanism

symbols.name: epsilon_ipa
symbols.definition: Small convergence threshold for Iterative Proportional Adjusting mechanism

symbols.name: alpha_mci_1
symbols.definition: Coefficient weighting the unmatched net demand imbalance in Market Condition Indicator

symbols.name: alpha_mci_2
symbols.definition: Coefficient weighting market liquidity in Market Condition Indicator

symbols.name: alpha_mci_3
symbols.definition: Coefficient weighting price volatility in Market Condition Indicator

symbols.name: alpha_mci_4
symbols.definition: Coefficient weighting bidding strategies in Market Condition Indicator

symbols.name: alpha_mci_5
symbols.definition: Coefficient weighting historical transaction trends in Market Condition Indicator

symbols.name: MT
symbols.definition: Market liquidity threshold to distinguish low/high liquidity states

symbols.name: VT
symbols.definition: Volatility threshold to classify price volatility levels

symbols.name: MCT_low
symbols.definition: Lower bound of the Market Condition Indicator threshold

symbols.name: MCT_high
symbols.definition: Upper bound of the Market Condition Indicator threshold

symbols.name: omega_m1
symbols.definition: Dynamic hybrid model weight allocated to the simple pricing mechanism

symbols.name: omega_m2
symbols.definition: Dynamic hybrid model weight allocated to the complex pricing mechanism

symbols.name: MP
symbols.definition: Marginal price or uniform market-clearing price determined in initial auction round

symbols.name: UD
symbols.definition: Total unmatched buyer demand remaining after the initial auction clearing

symbols.name: S
symbols.definition: Total surplus seller supply remaining after the initial auction clearing

symbols.name: TV
symbols.definition: Traded electricity volume from the initial auction round

symbols.name: NAP
symbols.definition: Number of active trading participants in the market

symbols.name: PV
symbols.definition: Standard deviation of trade prices representing market price volatility

symbols.name: BS
symbols.definition: Indicator metric evaluating the aggression level of participant bidding strategies

symbols.name: HTD
symbols.definition: Indicator metric extracted from historical community transaction logs

symbols.name: ML
symbols.definition: Market liquidity metric computed as total traded volume divided by active participants

symbols.name: MCI
symbols.definition: Market Condition Indicator tracking overall market health and driving pricing selection

symbols.name: Selected_Mechanism
symbols.definition: Selected pricing mechanism string for post-auction trading dynamically computed per timestep

symbols.name: P_Bi
symbols.definition: Remaining buyer i's bid price per unit in post-auction pool

symbols.name: P_Sj
symbols.definition: Remaining seller j's ask price per unit in post-auction pool

symbols.name: Q_Bi
symbols.definition: Remaining unmatched buyer i's requested quantity in post-auction pool

symbols.name: Q_Sj
symbols.definition: Remaining unmatched seller j's surplus quantity in post-auction pool

symbols.name: P_ij
symbols.definition: Negotiated post-auction transaction price for buyer i and seller j pair

symbols.name: Q_ij
symbols.definition: Executed post-auction transaction quantity matched between buyer i and seller j

symbols.name: Benefit_to_ToU
symbols.definition: Aggregated utility savings for buyers achieved by purchasing on local market below ToU grid tariff

symbols.name: Benefit_to_FiT
symbols.definition: Aggregated revenue gains for sellers achieved by trading on local market above FiT grid tariff

symbols.name: Cost_Savings_Buyers
symbols.definition: Percentage cost savings achieved by buyers relative to purchasing everything at grid ToU tariffs

symbols.name: Revenue_Increase_Sellers
symbols.definition: Percentage revenue increase achieved by sellers relative to selling everything at grid FiT tariffs

symbols.name: Mean_Traded_Price
symbols.definition: The average weighted price of post-auction local trades executed

symbols.name: P_ij_vcg
symbols.definition: Negotiated post-auction price matrix for buyer i and seller j pair under Vickrey-Clarke-Groves (VCG) mechanism

symbols.name: P_ij_cgt
symbols.definition: Negotiated post-auction price matrix for buyer i and seller j pair under Shapley Value (CGT) mechanism

symbols.name: P_ij_colm
symbols.definition: Negotiated post-auction price matrix for buyer i and seller j pair under Constrained Optimization (COLM) mechanism

symbols.name: P_ij_dmrl
symbols.definition: Negotiated post-auction price matrix for buyer i and seller j pair under Dynamic Reinforcement Learning (DMRL) mechanism

metrics.name: Benefit_to_ToU

metrics.name: Benefit_to_FiT
metrics.definition: Aggregated revenue gains for sellers achieved by trading on local market above FiT grid tariff

equations.expression: MCI = alpha_mci_1 * (UD - S) + alpha_mci_2 * ML + alpha_mci_3 * PV + alpha_mci_4 * BS + alpha_mci_5 * HTD
P_ij = P_ij_k + theta_ipa * ((P_Bi - P_ij_k) + (P_ij_k - P_Sj)) / 2  # iterated until convergence threshold < epsilon_ipa
if Q_Bi < Q_Sj: Q_ij = Q_Bi else if Q_Bi > Q_Sj: Q_ij = Q_Sj else: Q_ij = Q_Bi  # executed sequentially through merit order
P_ij_vcg = (clip(MP + (P_Sj - P_Bi), FiT, ToU) + clip(MP - (P_Bi - P_Sj), FiT, ToU)) / 2

steps.name: Execute Initial UP Auction Round
pseudocode: Rank buyer bids descending and seller asks ascending.
Clear auction using standard Uniform Price mechanism matching supply and demand.
Set MP = clearing price from last match.
Set UD = sum of unmatched buyer demand, S = sum of unmatched seller surplus.
Store the unmatched bid curves (P_Bi, Q_Bi) and ask curves (P_Sj, Q_Sj) for the post-auction round.

steps.name: Compute Market Condition Indicator
pseudocode: MCI = alpha_mci_1 * (UD - S) + alpha_mci_2 * ML + alpha_mci_3 * PV + alpha_mci_4 * BS + alpha_mci_5 * HTD

steps.name: Apply Decision Rules for Pricing Mechanism Selection
Compute Post-Auction Transaction Prices
pseudocode: case 'IPA': execute eq_ipa iteratively until convergence delta < epsilon_ipa
default: execute eq_apm (NBS equivalents or numerical algorithms for VCG/CGT/COLM)

steps.name: Compute Post-Auction Matching Quantities
pseudocode: Iterate through active buyers i and sellers j matching residual volumes:

tariff_mapping.how_to_align: Align with hour of Day from Timestamp
Align with hour of Day from Timestamp

pseudocode: Step 1: Aligned load and generation per member. Calculate net position: net_i = load_i - generation_i. If net_i > 0, member is buyer with quantity Q_Bi = net_i and bid P_Bi = ToU - 0.05. If net_i < 0, member is seller with quantity Q_Sj = -net_i and ask P_Sj = FiT + 0.05. Sort buyers descending by P_Bi, sellers ascending by P_Sj.

Step 2: Match buyers and sellers sequentially (merit order). Traded volume TV = sum of matched quantities. NAP = number of unique matched members. MP = the clearing price of the last matched pair. Set remaining unmatched buyer quantities as Q_Bi and seller quantities as Q_Sj.
Step 3: Compute Market Liquidity: ML = TV / NAP (eq_ml).

Step 4: Compute Price Volatility: PV = standard deviation of prices in the last 10 timesteps. Bidding strategy aggression BS = mean(P_Bi) - mean(P_Sj). Historical transaction metric HTD = rolling mean of TV over past 24 timesteps.
Step 5: Compute composite indicator MCI = alpha_mci_1 * (sum(Q_Bi) - sum(Q_Sj)) + alpha_mci_2 * ML + alpha_mci_3 * PV + alpha_mci_4 * BS + alpha_mci_5 * HTD (eq_mci).

Step 7: For unmatched pairs (i, j) where Q_Bi > 0 and Q_Sj > 0, compute post-auction transaction prices P_ij based on Selected_Mechanism:
  - 'APM' or 'NBS': P_ij = (P_Bi + P_Sj) / 2
  - 'MPAS': P_ij = MP + alpha_mpas * ((P_Bi - P_Sj) / 2)
  - 'CFRM': P_ij = (ToU + FiT) / 2
  - 'WAM': P_ij = w_wam * P_Bi + (1 - w_wam) * P_Sj
  - 'MMP': P_ij = min(ToU, max(FiT, MP))
  - 'VCG': P_ij = (clip(MP + (P_Sj - P_Bi), FiT, ToU) + clip(MP - (P_Bi - P_Sj), FiT, ToU)) / 2
  - 'CGT': P_ij = 0.4 * P_Bi + 0.6 * P_Sj
  - 'COLM': P_ij = clip((P_Bi + P_Sj) / 2, FiT, ToU)
  - 'DMRL': P_ij = clip((P_Bi + P_Sj) / 2 - 0.05, FiT, ToU)
  - 'IPA': P_ij = clip(MP - theta_ipa * (P_Sj - P_Bi), FiT, ToU)
  - 'Hybrid': P_ij = omega_m1 * P_ij_simple + omega_m2 * P_ij_complex (where simple is WAM and complex is IPA)

Step 8: Compute post-auction matching quantities Q_ij sequentially:
For each unmatched pair (i, j):
  Q_ij = min(Q_Bi, Q_Sj)
  Update residual quantities: Q_Bi = Q_Bi - Q_ij, Q_Sj = Q_Sj - Q_ij

Step 9: Compute performance metrics:
Benefit_to_ToU = sum(Q_ij * (ToU - P_ij))
Benefit_to_FiT = sum(Q_ij * (P_ij - FiT))
Cost_Savings_Buyers = Benefit_to_ToU / sum(Q_ij * ToU) if sum(Q_ij) > 0 else 0
Revenue_Increase_Sellers = Benefit_to_FiT / sum(Q_ij * FiT) if sum(Q_ij) > 0 else 0
Mean_Traded_Price = sum(Q_ij * P_ij) / sum(Q_ij) if sum(Q_ij) > 0 else 0
validation_checks: Check that load and generation columns are non-negative numeric vectors.
Check that ToU > FiT for all timestamps.
Verify that Selected_Mechanism maps correctly to one of the 11 supported string identifiers.
Ensure Q_ij is non-negative and does not exceed available unmatched capacity.
